title: HENBRANDT 10 x Mini Wax Crayons for Kids Pack of 4 Assorted Colours Children’s Stocking Fillers Wedding Activity Pack Birthday Party Favours Loot Bag Fillers Classroom Rewards for Boys and Girls
features: Set of 10 boxes of children’s mini crayons.
These boxes of colouring crayons are great for party bags, stocking fillers, Christmas Eve boxes, and arts and crafts activities in the classroom or while homeschooling.
Each box contains 4 non-toxic kids’ crayons in Blue, Green, Red and Yellow.
description: These boxes of mini colouring crayons for kids are great stocking fillers, loot bag gifts, party bag favours and Christmas Eve box fillers. Add the mini crayon boxes to activity packs for long journeys, Christmas, weddings, and birthday parties and help to keep children entertained. They are also ideal for classrooms, afterschool groups, and home school environments. Each box contains 4 non-toxic wax crayons – Blue, Green, Red and Yellow included. The crayons measure 8cm in length. Set of 10 boxes of mini crayons per order. This product is UKCA marked and complies with all applicable UK and EU safety requirements.
